text:
to locate the information you need, please contact ResDAC.
| SAS Name | Variable Name | 
|---|---|
| PRACTICE_ID | Model-Assigned Practice ID | 
| BILLING_TIN | Practice's Billing TIN | 
| TINS | List of Taxpayer Identification Numbers for the Practice | 
| NPIS | List of National Provider Identifiers in the Practice | 
| PRACTICE_NAME | Name of Practice | 
| GROUP_TYPE | Practice Group Type | 
| CCNS | List of CMS Certification Numbers (Facility Numbers) for the Practice | 
| ADDRESS_LINE_1 |
